items.text: dataout shall be within the closed interval [0, 20]

items.text: temperature_sensor shall define an internal variable k, initially set to 10

items.text: For each execution cycle, if previous k >= 20 then k := k - 1; if previous k <= 0 then k := k + 1; otherwise k remains unchanged
